title: SimpleTransport
description: SimpleTransport is a mod for your transportation-needs.
body:
SimpleTransport is a mod for your transportation-needs. Move items from and to inventories, machines, or destructors. All by using conveyor-belts.

I strongly advice using Better Dropped Items!! Use REI for the recipes. Requires the Fabric API

 

Whats in the mod
  • Conveyorbelts
  • Extractor with filter
  • Inserter
  • Destructor
  • Puller with filter
  • OPI (Overflow-Protected-Inserter)
  • Magnetic mode!

For more info: read the wiki! and check the gallery.

Want to support this, so I can develop more? Check the paypal-link!
